prompt.scholar: Which president is the only one to serve two non-consecutive terms (besides Trump)?
prompt.explorer: Before Trump, which president left the White House and then came back for a second time?

explanation.scholar: Grover Cleveland served as both the 22nd and 24th President, the first to serve non-consecutive terms.
explanation.explorer: Grover Cleveland was president #22 AND #24 — the first person to leave and come back!
